name: mostConfigureBusloadEthPkt
title: mostConfigureBusloadEthPkt
syntax: long mostConfigureBusloadEthPkt(long channel, long rate, long countertype, long counterpos, int64 srcadr, int64 destadr, long datalen, BYTE data[]);
description: The function configures the bus load generator for the Ethernet channel.
As an option, the packets can be supplied with a sequence counter.
Load generation can be started with the mostGenerateBusloadEthPkt function.

parameters.name: rate
parameters.description: Number of Ethernet packets per second. The maximum transmission rate depends on the packet length, the synchronous bandwidth control (SBC) and the MOST loop frequency. Due to arbitration delays, the bus load actually generated can deviate from the specified rate.

parameters.name: counterpos
parameters.description: Position of the lowest counter byte.

parameters.name: Note It is possible to set another source MAC address as the own one. The value "-1" is also valid and is used as wildcard to set the own MAC address.
dataLen
parameters.description: Number of data bytes to be sent (2 <= dataLen <= 1506).

parameters.name: Note At least two bytes have to be sent (Ethernet Type Field). In case more than 1502 Bytes should be sent, the VLAN Tag has to be set in the first two data bytes (0x81, 0x00).

availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
